raw_consumer_statement: I have a store credit card for Best Buy on XX/XX/2023 my card was refunded in the amount of XXXX after I cancelled an insurance plan I had with them. After I cancelled the plan they charged my other card to renew the plan eventhough I had already cancelled the plan. I was not aware they decided to charge my other card which by the way I was not aware of. The only reason I found out they charged my other card without persmission was because it was in default for no payments. I had not been keeping up with the payments since to my knowledge I did not owe anything they refused to clear the account and returned only XXXX I had to pay XXXX so they stop adding late payment fees which I should not have because I did not authorize that charge.
